```python
def main():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    if not S:
        print("")
        return

    # Create a new string to apply KMP's failure function
    temp = S + '#' + S[::-1]
    n = len(temp)
    fail = [0] * n

    for i in range(1, n):
        j = fail[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and temp[i] != temp[j]:
            j = fail[j - 1]
        if temp[i] == temp[j]:
            j += 1
        fail[i] = j

    # The value of the last element in fail gives the length of the longest palindromic suffix
    lps = fail[-1]
    # Characters to prepend are those before the palindromic suffix
    prepend = S[:len(S) - lps][::-1]

    print(prepend + S)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
